_comment: A-Wiki render-html surface registry. Add a new surface = add one template file + one entry here. No core renderer change needed.

scouter.title: Model Scouter — Free-Model Roster
scouter.description: Sortable/filterable comparison of scouted free/cheap models

report.title: Engineering Report
report.description: Post-mortem / code-review with severity badges, diffs, and timeline

health.title: A-Wiki Health Digest
health.description: Dashboard of wiki health checks, stats, and TODOs

graph.title: A-Wiki Knowledge Graph
graph.description: Interactive force-directed view of wiki nodes and links

plan.title: A-Wiki Plan Viewer
plan.description: Interactive data-journalist view of a plan .md file — progressive disclosure, phase approval cards, round-trip JSON decision to agent

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy Order Review
pharmacy.description: Drug-order lookup review: confidence-coded matches, items needing confirmation, not-found list — confirm the order before sending

delivery.title: Delivery Reconciliation
delivery.description: Order vs delivery invoice diff — qty mismatches, missing and extra items highlighted

audit.title: A-Wiki Audit Table
audit.description: Sortable/filterable table for search results or lint findings (orphan/stale/contradiction)

skills.title: Skill Quality Dashboard
skills.description: Skill-quality report: OK/WARN/FAIL summary + per-skill issues, sortable to prioritise fixes

agents.title: Visual Agent Ops
agents.description: Agent/trading-bot operations board: lanes, current states, risk, token budget, event timeline, and round-trip operator decisions

models.title: Model Chooser — Primary & Secondary
models.description: Per-provider catalog of scouted models grouped into primary (flagship) vs secondary (cheap/fast/free) with price/token; pick a main + backup and round-trip the selection back to the agent

live-dashboard.title: A-Wiki Live Dashboard
live-dashboard.description: Live action view: primary-agent model + cost tier, planned model lanes (route_plan), delegate events, and hook results streaming from .tmp/live-events.jsonl

status.title: A-Wiki Status
status.description: Alias of the health surface — wiki status overview (stats, checks, freshness)
